title: Code-switching — Multilingual Fluency
description: Switching between languages mid-sentence: when it builds intimacy vs when it signals exclusion.
summary_pt_br: Code-switching constrói pertencimento mas pode excluir. Combine audiência, preserve vocabulário, traduza.

scenes.subtitle_en: Switching between languages mid-sentence: when it builds intimacy vs when it signals exclusion.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Code-switching constrói pertencimento mas pode excluir. Combine audiência, preserve vocabulário, traduza.

scenes.text_en: Switching between languages mid-sentence: when it builds intimacy vs when it signals exclusion. Focus: code-switching — multilingual fluency. Brazilians living abroad often code-switch unconsciously.
scenes.text_pt: Code-switching constrói pertencimento mas pode excluir. Combine audiência, preserve vocabulário, traduza. Foco: code-switching — multilingual fluency. Brasileiros no exterior fazem code-switch sem notar.

scenes.title: Code-switching — Multilingual Fluency
scenes.body_en: Code-switching builds belonging within a group, but can exclude outsiders. Rules: match audience, preserve key vocabulary in its natural language, translate when anyone present won't follow.
scenes.body_pt: Code-switching constrói pertencimento mas pode excluir. Combine audiência, preserve vocabulário, traduza.

examples.en: Brazilians living abroad often code-switch unconsciously.
examples.pt: Brasileiros no exterior fazem code-switch sem notar.

examples.en: Switching to Portuguese for 'saudade' is untranslatable necessity.
examples.pt: Mudar pra português pra 'saudade' é inevitável.

examples.en: Code-switching mid-sentence can exclude outsiders from the conversation.
examples.pt: Code-switch pode excluir quem não fala ambas.

exercise.question: Complete: "Brazilians living abroad often code-switch ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Brazilians living abroad often code-switch unconsciously."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Brasileiros no exterior fazem code-switch sem notar.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Switching to Portuguese for 'saudade' is untranslatable necessity.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Switching to Portuguese for 'saudade' is untranslatable necessity."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Mudar pra português pra 'saudade' é inevitável.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Code-switching — Multilingual Fluency — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre code-switching — multilingual fluency. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Any rule for switching in meetings?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Match the least fluent person in the room.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Is bilingual thought different from monolingual?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes — concepts live across both languages.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Code-switching is fluency with a second heart.

scenes.title: The bilingual dinner
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe three code-switching rules and one example. Use at least three bilingual terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the bilingual dinner, Zara observed three fluent speakers navigate between Portuguese and English without ever pausing.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Brazilians living abroad often code-switch unconsciously — the word 'saudade' is simply untranslatable at dinner.

paragraphs.speaker: Friend
paragraphs.en: But when a monolingual guest arrives, we stay in one language out of simple hospitality, not performance.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Switching mid-sentence can exclude outsiders — fluent bilinguals have to choose inclusion deliberately every time.

paragraphs.speaker: Friend
paragraphs.en: Bilingual thought is different — whole concepts live across both languages, and some emotions only speak Portuguese.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Code-switching, Zara believed, is the deepest form of fluency — the ability to belong to two worlds at once.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Code-switching — Multilingual Fluency". Switching between languages mid-sentence: when it builds intimacy vs when it signals exclusion. Brazilians living abroad often code-switch unconsciously. Switching to Portuguese for 'saudade' is untranslatable necessity. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Code-switching — Multilingual Fluency". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Code-switching — Multilingual Fluency".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Code-switching — Multilingual Fluency".

scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
